query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_files,
  SUM(CASE WHEN url LIKE '%cloudinary%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cloudinary_files,
  SUM(CASE WHEN url LIKE '%cloudfront%' OR url LIKE '%amazonaws%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as s3_files
FROM media;

  SUM(CASE WHEN url LIKE '%cloudinary%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cloudinary_files,
  SUM(CASE WHEN url LIKE '%cloudfront%' OR url LIKE '%amazonaws%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as s3_files
FROM media;
